posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Upcoming community event all about monday Dev!

Calling all designers, developers, product managers, and beyond! Explore how monday dev can help organize a product lifecycle from start to finish with over 150+ templates and features that support epic roadmaps, sprint planning, retrospectives, bug tracking and more!

Whatever your monday.com experience, now is your chance to deep dive into monday dev straight from the team!

All about automations 28june (5)1920×1920 114 KB
